cases.notes: Order acceptance is replayable, and the watchdog appends a missing-user-confirmation mismatch when no user-channel update arrives within the timeout.
cases.title: Initial Runtime Records Live Acceptance Then Mismatch

cases.notes: A restarted process reconstructs the mismatch from the ledger, records the REST recovery, emits one fill, snapshots exchange state, and appends a position drift.
cases.title: Restart Replays Ledger And Appends Recovery/Fills/Drift

cases.notes: Recovery and fill lookup run again after replay, but no duplicate recovery, fill, or drift record is appended; only fresh exchange-state snapshots are appended.
cases.title: Second Restart Suppresses Duplicate Recovery Fill And Drift

description: Sanitized replayable audit-log sample showing runtime restart, ledger replay, recovery, fill reconciliation, exchange-state snapshots, drift append, and duplicate suppression after restart.
